mapper.insert: insert into t_fund_asset( fund_code, fund_name, fund_type, establish_date, asset_scale, fund_company, fund_company_desc, custodian, fund_manager, manager_start_date, manager_desc, operation_mode, closed_end_days, purchase_fee_rate, redeem_fee_rate, management_fee_rate, custodian_fee_rate, sales_service_fee_rate, trade_rule, remark, create_time, create_by, return_1m, return_3m, return_6m, return_1y, net_assets, stock_ratio, bond_ratio, cash_ratio, latest_scale, scale_history, institution_ratio, individual_ratio, internal_ratio ) values ( #{fundCode}, #{fundName}, #{fundType}, #{establishDate}, #{assetScale}, #{fundCompany}, #{fundCompanyDesc}, #{custodian}, #{fundManager}, #{managerStartDate}, #{managerDesc}, #{operationMode}, #{closedEndDays}, #{purchaseFeeRate}, #{redeemFeeRate}, #{managementFeeRate}, #{custodianFeeRate}, #{salesServiceFeeRate}, #{tradeRule}, #{remark}, now(), #{createBy}, #{return1m}, #{return3m}, #{return6m}, #{return1y}, #{netAssets}, #{stockRatio}, #{bondRatio}, #{cashRatio}, #{latestScale}, #{scaleHistory}, #{institutionRatio}, #{individualRatio}, #{internalRatio} )

insert into t_fund_manager_analysis ( fund_code, manager_name, star_rating, work_time, manage_scale, total_score, stock_select_score, return_score, risk_control_score, stability_score, timing_score, manager_desc, concentration_rate_analyse, turnover_rate_analyse, capability_path_analysis, scale_ability_analysis, professional_background, product_management_analysis, stability_analysis, personal_holding, holdings_concentration, turnover_rate, background_match, scale_capability, education, focus_on_this_fund, is_manager_holding, award_records, create_time, create_by ) values ( #{fundCode}, #{managerName}, #{starRating}, #{workTime}, #{manageScale}, #{totalScore}, #{stockSelectScore}, #{returnScore}, #{riskControlScore}, #{stabilityScore}, #{timingScore}, #{managerDesc}, #{concentrationRateAnalyse}, #{turnoverRateAnalyse}, #{capabilityPathAnalysis}, #{scaleAbilityAnalysis}, #{professionalBackground}, #{productManagementAnalysis}, #{stabilityAnalysis}, #{personalHolding}, #{holdingsConcentration}, #{turnoverRate}, #{backgroundMatch}, #{scaleCapability}, #{education}, #{focusOnThisFund}, #{isManagerHolding}, #{awardRecords}, now(), #{createBy} )

insert into t_fund_holding ( fund_code, hold_shares, available_shares, frozen_shares, cost_amount, market_value, profit_loss, profit_loss_rate, create_time, create_by, owner ) values ( #{fundCode}, #{holdShares}, #{availableShares}, #{frozenShares}, #{costAmount}, #{marketValue}, #{profitLoss}, #{profitLossRate}, now(), #{createBy}, #{owner} )

insert into t_fund_nav ( fund_code, nav_date, unit_nav, accumulated_nav, daily_change_rate, valuation, create_time ) values ( #{fundCode}, #{navDate}, #{unitNav}, #{accumulatedNav}, #{dailyChangeRate}, #{valuation}, now() )
mapper.update: update t_fund_asset set fund_name = #{fundName}, fund_type = #{fundType}, establish_date = #{establishDate}, asset_scale = #{assetScale}, fund_company = #{fundCompany}, fund_company_desc = #{fundCompanyDesc}, custodian = #{custodian}, fund_manager = #{fundManager}, manager_start_date = #{managerStartDate}, manager_desc = #{managerDesc}, operation_mode = #{operationMode}, closed_end_days = #{closedEndDays}, purchase_fee_rate = #{purchaseFeeRate}, redeem_fee_rate = #{redeemFeeRate}, management_fee_rate = #{managementFeeRate}, custodian_fee_rate = #{custodianFeeRate}, sales_service_fee_rate = #{salesServiceFeeRate}, trade_rule = #{tradeRule}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = now(), update_by = #{updateBy}, return_1m = #{return1m}, return_3m = #{return3m}, return_6m = #{return6m}, return_1y = #{return1y}, net_assets = #{netAssets}, stock_ratio = #{stockRatio}, bond_ratio = #{bondRatio}, cash_ratio = #{cashRatio}, latest_scale = #{latestScale}, scale_history = #{scaleHistory}, institution_ratio = #{institutionRatio}, individual_ratio = #{individualRatio}, internal_ratio = #{internalRatio} where id = #{id}

update t_fund_manager_analysis set manager_name = #{managerName}, star_rating = #{starRating}, work_time = #{workTime}, manage_scale = #{manageScale}, total_score = #{totalScore}, stock_select_score = #{stockSelectScore}, return_score = #{returnScore}, risk_control_score = #{riskControlScore}, stability_score = #{stabilityScore}, timing_score = #{timingScore}, manager_desc = #{managerDesc}, concentration_rate_analyse = #{concentrationRateAnalyse}, turnover_rate_analyse = #{turnoverRateAnalyse}, capability_path_analysis = #{capabilityPathAnalysis}, scale_ability_analysis = #{scaleAbilityAnalysis}, professional_background = #{professionalBackground}, product_management_analysis = #{productManagementAnalysis}, stability_analysis = #{stabilityAnalysis}, personal_holding = #{personalHolding}, holdings_concentration = #{holdingsConcentration}, turnover_rate = #{turnoverRate}, background_match = #{backgroundMatch}, scale_capability = #{scaleCapability}, education = #{education}, focus_on_this_fund = #{focusOnThisFund}, is_manager_holding = #{isManagerHolding}, award_records = #{awardRecords}, update_time = now(), update_by = #{updateBy} where id = #{id}

update t_fund_holding set hold_shares = #{holdShares}, available_shares = #{availableShares}, frozen_shares = #{frozenShares}, cost_amount = #{costAmount}, market_value = #{marketValue}, profit_loss = #{profitLoss}, profit_loss_rate = #{profitLossRate}, update_time = now(), update_by = #{updateBy} where id = #{id}

update t_fund_nav set nav_date = #{navDate}, unit_nav = #{unitNav}, accumulated_nav = #{accumulatedNav}, daily_change_rate = #{dailyChangeRate}, valuation = #{valuation}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
